Background.key_experience: Spent six months as the primary caregiver for an elderly neighbor who had no family, which solidified a lifelong commitment to local community service.

Cognition.bias: The Halo Effect (the tendency to believe that polite or friendly individuals are inherently more trustworthy and moral)

Current_State.recent_memory: Spent twenty minutes helping an elderly resident on my route set up their new digital thermostat because they were struggling with the instructions.
